
## 대한민국 행정구역
Administrative District

### 시군구
City County District

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
list_of_packages <- c("readr", "tidyr", "dplyr")
for (p in list_of_packages) {
    if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE)) {
        install.packages(p, dependencies = TRUE, verbose = FALSE)
    }
    library(p, character.only = TRUE, verbose = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
tb_kr <- read_csv("kosis/RH_시군구별.csv", col_select = 1,
    locale = locale(encoding = "UTF-8")) |> rename(시군구 = `A 행정구역(시군구)별`) |>
    separate_wider_delim(
        cols = 시군구, delim = " ", names = c("시군구코드", "시군구명"),
        too_many = "merge"
    )
tb_en <- read_csv("kosis/RH_by_CCD.csv", col_select = 1) |>
    rename(CCD = `A By Administrative District`) |>
    separate_wider_delim(
        cols = CCD, delim = " ", names = c("시군구코드", "City County District"),
        too_many = "merge"
    )
write.csv(left_join(tb_kr, tb_en, by = join_by(시군구코드)), file = "data/시군구.csv", fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
rm(list = ls())
```

```{r}

```
